subject: A massive moss-covered treefolk stands rooted in a deep forest, body of weathered bark and trailing vines
description: A towering treefolk fills the frame, body of weathered bark and clinging moss, branches splayed wide, roots planted in fern-thick forest floor. Background is layered forest greens. Mood is ancient, kindly, mentor-energy — flavor text reinforces it: 'Right now you are a feeble stick, but I will help you grow more rings.' Forest-elder-as-mentor.
foreground: Massive moss-covered treefolk with branch-arms splayed in fern-thick forest floor
background: Layered forest greens and dim filtered light
